mapper.sql: shikomino, modelno, id, serialModel, UpdateTime, CreateTime, CreateUser, UpdateUser, modelType, mainModelFlag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.shikomi_model
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.shikomi_model (shikomino, modelno, id, serialModel, UpdateTime, CreateTime, CreateUser, UpdateUser, modelType, mainModelFlag) values (#{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{mainmodelflag,jdbcType=CHAR})

insert into dbo.shikomi_model
shikomino,
modelno,
id,
serialModel,
UpdateTime,
CreateTime,
CreateUser,
UpdateUser,
modelType,
mainModelFlag,
#{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{mainmodelflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.shikomi_model
shikomino = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
serialModel = #{record.serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelType = #{record.modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR},
mainModelFlag = #{record.mainmodelflag,jdbcType=CHAR},

update dbo.shikomi_model set shikomino = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, serialModel = #{record.serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelType = #{record.modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR}, mainModelFlag = #{record.mainmodelflag,jdbcType=CHAR}

update dbo.shikomi_model
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
serialModel = #{serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelType = #{modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR},
mainModelFlag = #{mainmodelflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where shikomino = #{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.shikomi_model set id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, serialModel = #{serialmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelType = #{modeltype,jdbcType=CHAR}, mainModelFlag = #{mainmodelflag,jdbcType=CHAR} where shikomino = #{shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
